(E2) Mood Persistance CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns: mood persistance. 0 = No Mood Indicators; 1 = Indicators Present, easily altered; 2 = Indicators Present, not easily altered; "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
175 E3 E3_MOOD_CHANGE (E3) Change in Mood CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns: change is mood as compared to status 90 days ago. 0 = No change, 1 = Improved, 2 = Deteriorated. "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
176 E4AA E4AA_WANDERS (E4AA) Wandering Frequency CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns:
